headings.usage: H1, H2, H3, widget titles, major CTAs

body.usage: paragraphs, labels, small text, input fields

layout.spacing: Generous (p-6, p-8, p-12). Avoid cramped containers.
layout.grids: Control Room Grid for dashboards (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4, gap-6).
layout.alignment: RTL alignment natively. Use flex-row for horizontal stacks (browser handles RTL flip).
layout.radius: Subtle rounding (rounded-lg or rounded-xl). Avoid pill-shapes unless for small badges.

components_instructions.general: DO NOT USE SHADCN CARDS for everything. Go for rectangular, flat surfaces with 1px border-white/5. Override shadcn default styles to match the dark luxury theme.
components_instructions.buttons: Primary buttons: bg-[#D4AF37] text-black hover:bg-[#FDE047]. Secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/10 text-white hover:bg-white/5.
components_instructions.inputs: bg-[#121418] border-white/10 text-white placeholder-white/30 focus:border-[#D4AF37] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#D4AF37].
components_instructions.tables: Use for Leaderboards and Match History. Striped rows (transparent to white/5), hover states on rows. Text aligned to the start (Right for RTL).
components_instructions.chat: Match Challenge Chat: Dedicated scrollable container. Distinguish admin/leader messages (maybe gold subtle border). Input area only visible to authorized roles (mock this state). Image upload button present.
components_instructions.modals: Join Requests, Invites, Match creation. Glassmorphism overlay (backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60) with solid #121418 modal body.

features_mapping.auth: Email + Google Auth. Minimalist centered form on a dark abstract background.
features_mapping.clan_management: Clan profile page. Roster list (Players, Vice-Leader, Leader). Kick/Invite buttons next to players (for leader). Pending join requests list.
features_mapping.match_challenge: A view showing two competing clans (A vs B). Below it, the private chat interface. Status badge (Live, Upcoming, Finished).
features_mapping.live_matches: Bento grid of currently active matches. Highlighting the game being played and current score.
features_mapping.leaderboard: Ranked list of clans/players with their Elo/Points. Top 3 highlighted with Gold, Silver, Bronze accents.
features_mapping.history: List of matches finished in the last 24 hours.
features_mapping.search: Global search bar in header for Clans and Players. Returns a dropdown or dedicated search results page.
features_mapping.admin_panel: Separate view/tab for organizers to manage matches, verify results, and monitor chats.

game_logos.pubg: Use text or iconoir-react icons for abstraction
game_logos.fortnite: Use text or iconoir-react icons for abstraction
game_logos.valorant: Use text or iconoir-react icons for abstraction
game_logos.fifa: Use text or iconoir-react icons for abstraction
game_logos.csgo: Use text or iconoir-react icons for abstraction

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure the `<html dir='rtl'>` tag is set in `index.html` to enforce right-to-left layout globally.
Use standard Tailwind logical properties if needed, but flexbox naturally respects RTL when `dir='rtl'` is set.
Install and import Google Fonts: 'Cairo' and 'Tajawal'. Update tailwind.config.js to include them.
Construct the UI in dark mode only. Do not provide a light mode toggle.
Implement the Layout: Header (Nav, Search, Profile), Main Content (Bento Grid or Tabbed views for Dashboard).
Auth Page: Split screen. Left: Form. Right: 'stadium_hero' image with 'hero_background' overlay.
Mock data extensively to show all functionalities (Live matches, Clans, Chat messages, Leaderboard).

Chat Component: Implement a mock chat window. Add a text input and an image upload button (mocked functionality). Show distinction between Admin/Leader messages and regular player (view-only) messages.
Use Lucide-react for icons. Mirror directional icons (e.g., arrows) using 'transform scale-x-[-1]' if they don't auto-flip in RTL.
Include 'data-testid' on all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links, tabs).
